description: Document in Arabic script, probably legal, probably late. The date is given but is difficult to read. There are several different blocks of texts in which a scribe practiced writing out Hijrī dates but it is unclear if any specific year was listed.
description_he: מסמך בכתב ערבי, ככל הנראה משפטי; המאה המאוחרת; הסופר תרגל כתיבת תאריכים היג'ריים
